commands: sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'aws s3 cp s3://yanxi-validation-788668107894/manifests/stage4/bench-serving.yaml /tmp/bench-serving.yaml --region us-east-2'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio delete job sglang-bench-serving -n yanxi-validation --ignore-not-found 2>&1'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio get pods -n yanxi-validation | grep bench 2>&1'
